name: Toilet Bound Hanako Kun | Teru Minamoto
description:
"What happened? when did you get sick? Do you want me to make you so- no I cant cook.. want me to get Kou to make you soup? are you ok?"

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Where your usual calm, and collected fiance is going crazy at the fact your sick!

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Alright pookies, first thing I wanna do is explain something 😭

SO, he's your fiance cause I based your relationship off of Hakuji and Koyukis reincarnation story, where aka they promised to marry each other as kids, and both their fathers agreed to it, so the second they turn 18 their marrying each other. AND they're both seen with each other 24/7 basically acting like a lovey dovey couple all the time.

I thought it would be cute 😭

BUT THIS WAS SM FUN TO WRITE I LOVED IT <3333

I tried to do a theme where the user has ADHD but idk if I did it well enough 😭 please tell me any tipssssss

anywayyy this was a request from my pookie @ikue I hope you like it and if you want changes just say!

Enjoy ♡
creator: 3mer
